## Task

Describe the small modeling-note improvement.

## Technical Value

Explain how this improves assumptions, validation, units, reproducibility, or reading-log quality.

notes/
templates/

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Units are explicit where relevant.
- [ ] Assumptions are stated.
- [ ] Claims are evidence-backed.
- [ ] No copyrighted paper text is copied.
